rationale: Elec. Code §254.160 governs campaign treasurer termination reports for general-purpose committees. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: If the campaign treasurer appointment of a general-purpose committee is terminated, the campaign treasurer shall file a termination report as prescribed by Section 254.127 for a specific-purpose committee.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
